title: convolvulus rottlerianus subsp. stocksii
intro: Convolvulus rottlerianus subsp. stocksii is a plant species that belongs to the Convolvulaceae family, commonly known as the morning glory family, and is native to tropical regions of Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to the presence of alkaloids and glycosides. The health benefits of Convolvulus rottlerianus subsp. stocksii include its ability to treat fever, diarrhea, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its herbal preparations have been used to treat various ailments for centuries.
